business.name: Heating & Cooling
business.tagline: When your system quits, we don't

hero.headline: *Same-day fixes* when the big guys can't show up
hero.subheadline: No exorbitant house call fees. No upselling systems that still work fine. Just honest HVAC repair in Huntsville since 2003.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything HVAC — repaired right
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to complete installations, we handle it all with reasonable pricing

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: When your AC dies before surgery or your heat quits in winter, we respond same day. No waiting around for the big companies.

services.title: System Installation
services.description: Complete HVAC system installation with return duct replacement. Fair pricing, professional crew, bumper-to-bumper warranty.

services.title: Gas Line Installation
services.description: Safe, professional gas line installation for dryers and appliances. Reasonable quotes, on-time service, polite crews.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance
services.description: Thorough inspections with clear explanations of what needs attention and why. Keep your system running smoothly year-round.

about.heading: Serving Huntsville since 2003
about.body: We're the HVAC team your neighbors call when the big contractors charge too much or can't show up. Same-day service, honest pricing, and we actually answer the phone. From emergency repairs to complete system installations, we've been keeping Huntsville comfortable for over 20 years.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: Why neighbors choose us over the big guys

reviews.name: Julien Y.
reviews.text: Right on schedule with impressive attention to detail. They thoroughly inspected our aging AC, explained exactly what needed attention and why, then worked efficiently until everything ran perfectly.

reviews.name: Stuart O.
reviews.text: Tired of large HVAC contractors charging ridiculous fees and pushing new systems. Called these guys — immediate response, same-day service, quick fix with clear explanation.

reviews.name: Jim M.
reviews.text: Been using them since 2003. Installed our system and replaced return ducts for a very reasonable price. Always prompt during the warranty period — never had to wait.

reviews.name: Cliff M.
reviews.text: AC died two days before major surgery. Our usual guy wouldn't answer, big companies couldn't come out. Found these guys on Nextdoor — great reviews and they saved the day.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: Same-day service throughout the Huntsville metro area

cta.heading: Need HVAC service today?
cta.body: Don't wait around for the big companies. We answer the phone and show up when we say we will. Get honest pricing and same-day service.
